data.title: GURU Organic Energy Reports Record Q1 Revenue of $8.8 Million and Third Consecutive EBITDA-Positive Quarter
data.description: The gross margin increased to 63.0%, while the net loss showed improvement year-over-year.

data.title: AES Deploys AI Safety Platform in U.S. Operations
data.description: A company based in Arlington, Virginia, revealed that their AI technology, Haven Safety AI, has resulted in investigations being completed 50% faster than before. This innovative system has been successful in pinpointing systemic risks that pose threats to frontline workers. The AES Corporation, listed on NYSE as AES, shared this milestone on March 12, 2026. This advancement marks one of the initial instances of significant integration of AI in the energy sector, showcasing promising outcomes for improved safety measures and risk identification.

data.title: G-III Apparel Group, Ltd. Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year Fiscal 2026 Results; Provides Fiscal 2027 Outlook
data.description: On March 12, 2026, G-III Apparel Group, Ltd. shared financial updates for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year ending January 31, 2026. The company, trading under NasdaqGS as GIII, reported its earnings for this period.

data.title: St John Knits names Mandy West as CEO
data.description: On March 12, 2026, Lanvin Group (NYSE: LANV) disclosed that Mandy West has been appointed as the new Chief Executive Officer of St John Knits, a subsidiary of the Group. The appointment, effective from March 6, 2026, marks Ms. West's transition to the CEO role. Ms. West has been with St John Knits since 2019, making her well-versed in the company's operations. This move signifies a strategic decision by Lanvin Group to bolster the leadership of St John Knits with an experienced professional.

data.title: Chicago Atlantic Real Estate Finance Announces Fourth Quarter 2025 Financial Results
data.description: On March 12, 2026, Chicago Atlantic Real Estate Finance, Inc. (NASDAQ: REFI) disclosed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2025. Chicago Atlantic, a commercial mortgage real estate investment trust, shared its earnings report for the mentioned periods.

data.title: Freightos Appoints Pablo Pinillos as Chief Executive Officer and Member of the Board of Directors
data.description: CFO Pinillos has taken over from founder Zvi Schreiber to steer Freightos Limited (NASDAQ: CRGO) through its next growth phase on a global scale. Headquartered in Barcelona, Spain, the company is a key player in digital pricing, booking, and procurement for international logistics. The transition occurred on March 12, 2026, marking a significant milestone in the company’s leadership. With its robust platform, Freightos Limited continues to make strides in the industry, poised for further expansion and success.
Ollie’s Bargain Outlet Holdings announces Q4 FY 2025 results with revenue reaching $500M, exceeding expectations.

data.title: VULCAN MATERIALS TO OUTLINE NEW GROWTH AND PROFITABILITY TARGETS AT 2026 INVESTOR DAY
data.description: In Birmingham, Alabama, on March 12, 2026, Vulcan Materials Company, identified as VMC on the New York Stock Exchange, holds the title of being the largest producer of construction aggregates in the United States. The company plans to establish fresh cash gross profit per ton and earnings objectives. Additionally, they aim to unveil their strategy for securing success in the aggregates sector at their 2026 Investor event.

data.title: Centrus Partners with Palantir to Drive Cost Savings and Unlock Operational Efficiencies in Major Expansion of U.S. Uranium Enrichment Capacity
data.description: A recent report has revealed that an initial analysis has pinpointed approximately $300 million in potential cost reductions. The collaboration involves Palantir Technologies Inc., a top supplier of AI technology and enterprise operating systems, and Centrus Energy, a U.S.-based company traded on the NYSE under the symbol LEU. This information was disclosed in Bethesda, Md. on March 12, 2026, and presents promising prospects for significant financial savings.

data.title: FLOKI price stalls at zero with mixed signals; RSI at 48.47 neutral but MACD bearish. Limited analyst coverage.
data.description: Forecasting the price of FLOKI proves difficult as key indicators reveal a neutral RSI of 48.47 alongside bearish MACD momentum. Analyst coverage for this cryptocurrency is limited, adding to the uncertainty surrounding its future performance.

data.title: J.Jill, Inc. to Report Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2025 Results on March 31, 2026
data.description: In Quincy, Massachusetts, clothing retailer J.Jill, Inc. (NYSE:JILL) has revealed that they will unveil their financial outcomes for Q4 and fiscal year 2025 prior to the market opening on Tuesday, March 31, 2026. The CEO, Mary Ellen Coyne, and CFO/COO, Mark Webb, will conduct a conference call at 8:00 a.m. EST on the same day to delve into the financial statistics. Those keen on tuning in include investors and analysts.

data.title: Build-A-Bear Workshop Announces Chief Executive Officer Succession
data.description: In St. Louis, the Board of Directors of Build-A-Bear Workshop (NYSE: BBW) revealed that CEO Sharon Price John is set to retire on June 11, 2026, coinciding with the Company’s Annual Shareholders’ Meeting. This move is part of a strategic succession plan. The Board unanimously selected Chris Hurt, the Chief Operations and Experience Officer, to take over as the new CEO. This transition marks a significant change in leadership for the company.

data.title: Prodalim Strengthens its Functional Platform to Enter the Fast-Growing Nutraceutical Market with the Acquisition of Sylvestre, a Market Leader in Botanical Extracts Based in Brazil
data.description: Prodalim, a prominent company in juice and specialty ingredients, has recently finalized the acquisition of Sylvestre, a top Brazilian manufacturer of botanicals and functional extracts tailored for the nutraceutical sector. Established in 1992, Sylvestre is renowned for its high-quality natural ingredients. The deal ensures that Sylvestre's current owners and management team will continue to operate the company, facilitating its seamless integration into Prodalim's operations. This move solidifies Prodalim's foothold in the market and enhances its position as a global leader in the industry.

data.title: Movado Group, Inc. Announces Date of Conference Call and Webcast for Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2026 Results
data.description: In Paramus, N.J., Movado Group, Inc. (NYSE: MOV) is extending an invitation to investors for a live broadcast of the conference call to review the company's Q4 and full-year fiscal results for 2026. The call is scheduled for Thursday, March 19, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. ET. Prior to the call, a press release containing the details of the Q4 and fiscal year 2026 results will be disseminated before the market opens. The conference call, led by Efraim Grinberg, Chairman and CEO, will provide insights into the company's performance.

data.title: TON price aiming for $1.73 by March 10 with 120% upside potential. Bullish momentum suggests rally to $3.00 based on technical analysis.
data.description: Toncoin is currently experiencing a strong upward trend, with CoinCodex predicting a price target of $1.73 by March 10. Additionally, technical analysis indicates the presence of a falling wedge pattern, hinting at a possible surge towards the $3.00 range in the near future.
